user.title: Authenticate with SingleKey-ID
user.description:
Click the link below to log in with your Bosch SingleKey-ID (MyBuderus) account.

After login the browser will show a "can't reach this site" error — this is expected.

Copy the **full URL** from the browser address bar and paste it below.

callback.title: Paste the Redirect URL
callback.description:
[Log in with SingleKey-ID]({auth_url})

After login, copy the full URL from the browser address bar (it starts with `com.buderus.tt.dashtt://...`) and paste it below.

data_description.callback_url: The full URL from the browser address bar after login

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please re-authenticate with your SingleKey-ID account.

error.invalid_url: Could not find an authorization code in the URL. Make sure you copied the entire URL.
error.token_exchange_failed: Failed to exchange the authorization code for tokens. Please try again.

abort.no_gateway: No heat pump gateway found on this account. Make sure you have paired a device in the MyBuderus app.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the heat pump (300–3600 seconds, default 600)
